---
title: "Chapters"
---

## Overview

This section contains all course chapters covering numerical methods for energy, thermal, and fluid engineering.

## Available chapters

- [Chapter 1: Introduction](chapter1.qmd)
- [Chapter 2: Initial Value Problems](chapter2.qmd)
- [Chapter 3: Boundary Value Problems](chapter3.qmd)
- [Chapter 4: Elliptic and Parabolic Problems](chapter4.qmd)
- [Chapter 5: Numerical Solution of Algebraic Systems](chapter5.qmd)
